title.en: Soon, they got back to business.

content.en:
Ye Tian and the Lord of Eternal Zero didn't discuss the matter of the Heart of the Other Shore for too long.

Soon, they got back to business.

Then.

The Lord of Eternal Zero said: "Many treasures in the land of the other side of eternity have the possibility of giving birth to source stones on the other side, so many forces have more or less collected a few source stones from the other side, but the number is too small to help you much. If you want to get a lot of Source Stones from the other side, I can only give a few suggestions. "

Ye Tian listened and did not speak.

The Lord of Eternal Zero continued, "You should know about the Eternal Night Pavilion. The Eternal Night Pavilion is one of the top forces in the White Mountain Domain in the Seventy-Two Eastern Regions, specializing in business, and its business is spread across many regions, even our Bloody Domain has their business. After many forces find the source stone on the other side, they will trade it to the Eternal Night Pavilion in exchange for other resources. Therefore, the Eternal Night Pavilion definitely has no shortage of source stones on the other side. However, if you want to trade a large number of Source Stones from the Eternal Night Pavilion, it is up to you to do it yourself. "

"The second suggestion is to go to the Ancient God Domain on the other side. The Ancient God Domain on the other side is a ruined area, and the area is one-third the size of our Blood Yan Domain. This area has given birth to a lot of source stones from the other side, and any cultivator, blood transformation realm race, and even eternal true beasts can enter this ancient god domain on the other side to find the source stones on the other side. However, the Ancient God Domain on the other side was occupied by a large force, the Ancient God Sect, and they blocked this area. If you want to enter, you will have to pay a fee. Therefore, if you are unlucky, you will not find many source stones on the other side, but you will lose money. "

"The third suggestion is to find a force to buy the source stone on the other side at a high price, but people may not necessarily sell it to you, so you need to depend on luck. "

After listening to these three suggestions, Ye Tian had an idea.

Thereupon.

After he thanked the Lord of Eternal Zero, he prepared to go to the Ancient God Domain on the other side first.

At the very least, this is the most promising place to get the source stone on the other side.

......

The Ancient God Domain on the other side was a little far away from the Blood Yan Domain, but it still took Ye Tian a while to arrive here.

When he came here, he saw the bone transformation realms of the Ancient God Sect stationed at an entrance.

The Ancient God Sect is also a cultivator force, but it will also accept some blood transformation realm races.

Therefore, the force of the Ancient God Sect has both cultivators and a small number of Blood Transformation Realm races.

Entering the Ancient God Domain on the other side is just one place, and all the other places are covered by a large array covering one territory.

This was a formation that had been arranged by multiple Origin Realm beings over a long period of time, so he couldn't break it, so he could only enter through this entrance.

"Stop, if you want to enter the Ancient God Domain on the other side, you must pay 100,000 medium eternal ancient gold in an ancient era! Everyone must pay 100,000 medium eternal ancient gold, even if there is not enough time, it has to be this price. After it comes out, continue to settle for as long as you stay. An Ancient God Sect's Nine Bone Transformation Realm said.

"Give!"

Ye Tian took out 100,000 medium eternal ancient gold, paid these fees, and then passed through a light gate and entered the ancient god domain on the other side.

The Ancient Gods of the Other Side.

Ye Tian came in here.

Look around.

There was debris everywhere, and there was hardly a single living thing left.

He searched for a long time, but he didn't see any other creatures.

"Once upon a time, the Ancient God Domain on the other side should have been the same as the Taichao Domain and the Blood Yan Domain, it also had countless living beings, countless worlds, countless Blood Transformation Realm races, and Eternal True Beasts, but now they have all turned into pieces!"

Ye Tian said with emotion.

But.

There are still some resources here, as well as the source stones on the other side, whether you can find them depends on your luck.

Time passes slowly.

It was a long time before he found a source stone from the other side.

"It took so long to find a source stone from the other side, which is simply too pitiful. If you continue like this, you will even lose money!" Ye Tian said darkly.

Abrupt.

A cold light emerged from the void, and it was an ancient genius of the Seven Bone Transformation Realm who attacked and killed him.

"Look for death!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"The Void on the other side, suppress!"

"Jin Mang on the other side, broken!"

Meanwhile.

Ye Tian's golden body on the other side of the incarnation body Ye urged, and there was no hand left at all.

Rumble!!!!

The golden mang of the other side cooperated with his high-level divine weapon of the other side, and the other side of the heavenly spear penetrated the opponent's body with one blow.

This moment.

The other party looked incredulous.

In his opinion, he is an ancient-level genius of the seventh-time bone transformation realm, and even if he encounters a sixth-time bone transformation-level genius, he may not necessarily lose!

As a result, he was penetrated by Ye Tian's move.

Although he hasn't fallen yet, it also proves that Ye Tian's strength is far above him.

It's incredible!

"The most beneficial, the other side level genius, was actually met by me!!!"

He was completely confused.

He wanted to escape, but Ye Tian didn't give him any hope of escaping.

Ye Tian used the Cave Extreme Escape Method, and the speed was so fast that even this Seventh Bone Transformation Realm Ancient Genius couldn't react.

Then came the incessant assault.

Puff puff!!!

This seven-time bone transformation realm genius's body was pierced countless times, and he completely fell and died.

After killing this seven-time Bone Transformation Realm genius, he took the other party's belongings.

"There are a lot of resources, and there are more than thirty source stones from the other side!"

Ye Tian roughly guessed why this Seventh Bone Transformation Realm Ancient Genius was attacking him, the other party's goal was to attack and kill some weak people here, so as to rob the other party's materials and resources, so as to make money.

In fact, there weren't many other shore level geniuses who entered the other side of the ancient god domain to find the other side of the source stone, many of them were ordinary bone transformation realms to look for here, and after finding them, they took them out and sold them.

For them, if they can not lose money in the Ancient God Domain on the other side, or even make a lot of money, they are willing to come in again and again.

So.

Many of the Bone Transformation Realms here are Boundary-Breaking Geniuses, Ancient Geniuses, and even ordinary Bone Transformation Realms, all of which rely on luck.

As a result, this Seventh Bone Transformation Realm Ancient Genius was very unlucky, and he took Ye Tian as a target, and as a result, he fell here.

Of course.

Ye Tian would not do such a thing, if the news was leaked and he offended an unknown force, he would also be very troublesome.

So.

He still slowly searched for the source stone on the other side by himself.

If there is a bone transformation realm that wants to trouble him, he will definitely still make a move.

Time flies.

After a long time, he still hadn't found many source stones.

But on this day.

A battle broke out in the distance, and Ye Tian went over to take a look.

Suddenly.

He saw a very strange creature fighting an eight-time Bone Transformation Realm primeval genius.

The point is, this creature is actually inlaid with pieces of source stones from the other side.
